# /tdd

> Generate the feature-scoped TDD per [ADR-0006](../../../design/adr/0006-doc-scope-domain-vs-feature.md). F&O TDDs preserve the FastTrack pattern: every method in §5.6/§5.7 carries pseudocode; quality checklist self-review at the end.

## Usage

```
/tdd [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>]
```

## Inputs

- `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/plan.md` (`PLAN_CLARIFIED` APPROVED)
- `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/fdd.md`
- [templates/tdd.template.md](../../templates/tdd.template.md)
- [constitution/04-extension-coding-standards.md](../../constitution/04-extension-coding-standards.md) (32-type X++ extension catalogue + naming + CoC patterns)

## Execution flow

1. Render `tdd.template.md` into `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/tdd.md`.
2. Per ★ mandatory section, populate:
   - §5 Object detail (per object-id in plan §L4)
   - §5.6 Method-level pseudocode (per X++ class, per method)
   - §5.7 CoC extension wiring (Chain-of-Command point + replaced/extended method)
   - §5.8 Service classes for INT-NN
   - §5.9 DMF projects for DEN-NN
   - §5.10 ER configurations
   - §5.11 Workflows (F&O workflow framework, distinct from Power Automate)
   - §5.12 Open Items / `<TBD>`
3. **Inline self-check** against [templates/checklists/tdd-review.checklist.md](../../templates/checklists/tdd-review.checklist.md). BLOCKERs fail the write.
4. Run `doc_lint`.
5. `currentStates += TDD_DRAFT`.

## F&O-specific rules

- Pseudocode REQUIRED on every method (per the ported FastTrack convention)
- `<TBD>` count surfaces in §5.12
- Quality checklist appendix consumed by next reviewer (per [constitution/06-documentation-and-change.md](../../constitution/06-documentation-and-change.md))
- Object-id prefixes link L4 → TDD object detail

## Output

- `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/tdd.md`
